title: Farms & Foods
description: A simple Farming and Cooking Mod!
body:
This is a Mod that came into existence through

experimenting with my Skyblock Mod - Ex Nihilo Fabricio

Now you can Cook without the Skyblock Stuff by simply obtaining
Seeds, and start farming 11 new crops!


Here's what's new:

Chili
Paprika
Garlic
Spinach
Eggplant
Zucchini
Onion
Corn
Rice
Cabbage
Tomato

And with that, you can cook up to 40 recipes! And the challenge? You have to figure the recipes out! Just like the old times!
